# LLM Integration Context

## OpenAI

Use official Go SDK:
github.com/openai/openai-go

Use ChatCompletion API.
Model: gpt-4o-mini (or configurable)

Temperature: 0.2
Max tokens: 50

## Gemini

Use official Gemini Go SDK.
Model: gemini-1.5-flash

Temperature: 0.2
Max output tokens: 50

## Prompt Template

You are a search query optimizer.
Convert user intent into concise, optimized Google search query.
Return only the search string.
No explanation.
